name: Crock-Pot Fifteen-Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 package Polska kielbasa, sliced into coins (we prefer turkey kielbasa)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight, changing water frequently.
2. Drain the beans.
3. In the crock-pot, cover the beans with 1 inch of water.
4. Add all other ingredients except kielbasa.
5. Cover and cook on high for one hour; then turn to low and cook overnight.
6. Stir once or twice during cooking.
7. One hour before serving, check the texture of the soup. If it's too thin, mash some of the beans with a potato masher.
8. Add sliced kielbasa.
9. Cook for one hour. Serve with Tabasco sauce and bread or rice.
10. Serves 4 generously.
